chapters.title: Prologue
chapters.summary: Mara receives the notebook that points to a sealed tide station under Signal Harbor.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: First Sounding
chapters.summary: Mara confirms the notebook references a real maintenance corridor below the bluff.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Pressure Line
chapters.summary: Diver Ivo Mercer joins the search and realizes the harbor siren network is still carrying hidden traffic.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: Blue Room
chapters.summary: The team reaches the blue-walled chamber and learns the archive was built to filter dangerous signals, not preserve history.
